title: Senior Teacher - Pratham Education - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Pratham Education - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Join the Pratham Education family as a Senior Teacher in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Pratham Education:
Pratham Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education!
